reading.title: Reading: Notice in the neighbourhood
reading.passage:
NEW SUPERMARKET OPENING THIS WEEK
Visit the new supermarket on Le Loi Street. It is next to the old bank and opposite a small park. The supermarket is open every day from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m.

questions.question: The supermarket is opposite a school.
questions.explanation: Nó đối diện một công viên, không phải trường học.

reading.title: Reading: Where is everything?
reading.passage: The pharmacy is between the café and the bank. The cinema is opposite the market. The gym is on the second floor of the hotel, next to the restaurant.

questions.question: Where is the pharmacy?
options: Between the café and the bank
questions.correct: Between the café and the bank
questions.explanation: Câu đầu nêu rõ vị trí của nhà thuốc.

questions.question: The gym is on the first floor.
